mcqs.question: For a fair coin toss (p(H) = p(T) = 0.5), what is the Shannon entropy in bits?
Mutual Information I(X;Y) measures:

options.text: The uncertainty about X given Y
The amount of information shared between X and Y
The conditional entropy of X given Y
The joint probability of X and Y

mcqs.explanation: Mutual Information I(X;Y) quantifies the reduction in uncertainty about X after observing Y (or vice versa), representing shared information.

mcqs.question: Given P(X=0, Y=0)=0.25, P(X=0, Y=1)=0.25, P(X=1, Y=0)=0.25, P(X=1, Y=1)=0.25, what is the joint entropy H(X,Y)?
mcqs.explanation: Since all four joint outcomes have probability 0.25 (uniform over 2 bits), H(X,Y) = -4×(0.25×log₂0.25) = -4×(0.25×(-2)) = 2 bits.

mcqs.question: Which relationship correctly expresses Mutual Information in terms of entropies?

options.text: Both A and B are correct

mcqs.explanation: Both I(X;Y) = H(X) + H(Y) - H(X,Y) and I(X;Y) = H(X) - H(X|Y) are valid equivalent expressions for mutual information.

mcqs.question: The KL Divergence D(P||Q) = 0 if and only if:

options.text: P and Q have the same mean
P and Q have the same variance

mcqs.explanation: KL divergence is zero when the two distributions are identical (P(x) = Q(x) for all x), indicating no information loss when using Q to approximate P.

mcqs.question: In a communication system, if H(X) = 4 bits and H(X|Y) = 1 bit, what is the channel capacity (assuming optimal encoding)?
mcqs.explanation: Channel capacity C = I(X;Y) = H(X) - H(X|Y) = 4 - 1 = 3 bits per channel use, representing maximum reliable transmission rate.

mcqs.question: For two binary random variables where P(X=1)=0.9, P(Y=1|X=1)=0.8, P(Y=1|X=0)=0.3, calculate I(X;Y).
Given P = [0.5, 0.25, 0.25] and Q = [0.5, 0.5, 0], which statement about D(P||Q) and D(Q||P) is correct?

options.text: D(P||Q) is infinite, D(Q||P) is finite
D(P||Q) is finite, D(Q||P) is infinite

mcqs.explanation: D(P||Q) is finite since Q has no zero probabilities where P has positive mass. D(Q||P) is infinite because P(X₃)=0.25>0 but Q(X₃)=0, causing log(0/0.25) = -∞.
